A random address must revert."},"testTransferOwnership()":{"notice":"Ownership can be transferred; old owner loses privileges."},"testUnauthorizedCannotRebalance()":{"notice":"A random address must NOT be able to call handleReactiveRebalance."},"testYieldTracking()":{"notice":"After N swaps, cumulativeVolume and swapCount should be non-zero."},"testYieldVelocityView()":{"notice":"yieldVelocity() should return a non-zero value once swaps have occurred."}},"notice":"Comprehensive Foundry test for the KineticYield autonomous LP rebalancer hook.   Test cases:     1. testYieldTracking           \u2014 swaps accumulate volume + swap count correctly.     2. testYieldVelocityView       \u2014 yieldVelocity() returns a non-zero value after swaps.     3. testReactiveRebalanceTrigger \u2014 REACTIVE_SENDER can trigger a rebalance and                                       liquidity is removed + BridgeInitiated emitted.     4. testUnauthorizedCannotRebalance \u2014 random address cannot call handleReactiveRebalance.     5. testEmergencyPausePreventsRebalance \u2014 owner pause blocks reactive triggers.     6. testEmergencyPauseToggle    \u2014 owner can pause AND unpause.     7. testSetReactiveSenderOnlyOwner \u2014 only owner can change sender address.     8. testTransferOwnership       \u2014 ownership can be testReactiveRebalanceTrigger().details: In the signal-only architecture, the hook does NOT directly modify liquidity.      It emits RebalanceTriggered + BridgeInitiated so a companion vault contract      (off-hook) listens and executes the actual withdrawal + bridge transfer.

testEmergencyPausePreventsRebalance().notice: When the hook is paused, REACTIVE_SENDER cannot trigger a rebalance.

testEmergencyPauseToggle().notice: After pausing, the owner can unpause and REACTIVE_SENDER can trigger again.

testReactiveRebalanceTrigger().notice: REACTIVE_SENDER can trigger a rebalance; both events must be emitted.

testSetReactiveSenderOnlyOwner().notice: Only the owner can update the Reactive sender. A random address must revert.

testTransferOwnership().notice: Ownership can be transferred; old owner loses privileges.

testUnauthorizedCannotRebalance().notice: A random address must NOT be able to call handleReactiveRebalance.

testYieldTracking().notice: After N swaps, cumulativeVolume and swapCount should be non-zero.

testYieldVelocityView().notice: yieldVelocity() should return a non-zero value once swaps have occurred.
